content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Your Resource Group LLC: Remote Inside Sales Anywhere in the World Maryland Sales Sales and Marketing Contract <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5078/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> USA <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://yourresourcegroup.com/">https://yourresourcegroup.com/</a> </p> <p>Account Executive - Inside Sales<br><strong>About US<br><br></strong>We are a financial services start up focusing on helping US consumers improve their credit.<br><br>Here you can feel good about helping people while working from home and earning a generous commission package. <br><br>We offer a $1,000 USD training draw for your first month, no lead costs, and tons of growth opportunity.&nbsp;<br><br>If you are a seasoned Sales Professional with near native English language proficiency, we want to hear from you!<strong><br></strong><br><strong>Compensation<br><br></strong>This is a 100% commission role (draw or commission, whichever is higher)<br><br>OTE (first year) for top reps is $4,500/Month<br><br>Average OTE (first year) is $3,000/Month<strong><br><br></strong><br><strong>What will you be doing?<br><br></strong>Help inbound callers understand their credit situation and provide consultations with the goal of enrolling them in one of our services should they be a good fit. <br><strong><br>What will make you successful?</strong><br><br>You will be directly compensated for your ability to help meet business targets: daily KPI goals, clients assisted, and revenue collected.<br><br>Goal Oriented – self-starters who can meet and exceed sales goals<br><br>Learners – always looking to improve and grow<br><br>Tech savvy – able to navigate digital tools</p> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/your-resource-group-llc-remote-inside-sales-1">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/your-resource-group-llc-remote-inside-sales-1</a></p> Wed, 06 May 2026 18:04:24 +0000 Fri, 05 Jun 2026 18:04:24 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/your-resource-group-llc-remote-inside-sales-1 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/your-resource-group-llc-remote-inside-sales-1 EverAI: Mid/Senior AI Cinematic Video Editor (Full Remote - Worldwide) Anywhere in the World Santa Venera All Other Remote Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/4178/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Malta <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://everai.ai">http://everai.ai</a> </p> <h1>Our Vision &amp; Products</h1> <p><em><strong> EverAI — Building the Future of AI Companionship</strong></em></p> <p><em>One of the Top 15 Largest &amp; Fastest-Growing AI Companies in the World</em></p> <p><em>50 Million Users in 2 years — Help Us Reach 100M first, 500M next<br><br></em></p> <p>At&nbsp;<strong>EverAI</strong>, we’re shaping what it means to connect with AI. With&nbsp;<strong>50 million users and counting</strong>, we're not just building products — we're creating entirely new categories.</p> <p>Our flagship product is the&nbsp;<strong>world’s largest AI companionship platform</strong>, redefining relationships for millions. It is governed by our proprietary moderation system, EverGuard — an internal AI designed to ensure everything we build is&nbsp;<strong>safe, ethical, and human-first</strong>.</p> <p><em>And we’re only just getting started!</em></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <h1>Our Team</h1> <p>We are an enthusiastic, passionate and hardworking team of ≈ 75 people. Our founding team has strong entrepreneurial experience building and scaling web products from 0 to IPO.<br><br></p> <p><strong>Alexis Soulopoulos&nbsp;</strong>[CEO]</p> <p><em>• 10+ years in Tech Executive Leadership</em></p> <p><em>• Co-Founder Mad Paws Holdings (from 0 to IPO)</em></p> <p><em>• Forbes 30 under 30 + Deloitte TechFast50 ’22 &amp; ‘23</em></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Michael Monin</strong>&nbsp;[Co-founder &amp; CTO]</p> <p><em>• 10+ years as CTO / COO (web2/web3), 1+ year in AI/LLM</em></p> <p><em>• Serial-entrepreneur: MTK Digital (exited / 0-&gt;$20m revenue) and Zipchat (AI Chatbot for E-commerce brands)</em></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Thomas Lacroix&nbsp;</strong>[Co-founder &amp; CMO]</p> <p><em>• 8+ years in Customer Acquisition &amp; E-commerce Growth</em></p> <p><em>• Serial-entrepreneur: Curatible (sold to Blackstone) and MTK Digital (exited / 0-&gt;$20m revenue)</em></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Maruša Fasano&nbsp;</strong>[CFO/Legal]</p> <p><em>• 25+ years in Finance, Strategy, M&amp;A</em></p> <p><em>• Ex-CFO/M&amp;A @Curatible (exited to Blackstone)</em></p> <p><em>• Ex-President of the Board @SotremoSA (exited)</em></p> <p><em>• Co-founder/CFO @SoftOne (exited)</em></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <h1>Your Role</h1> <p><strong>We are looking for a Mid/Senior AI Cinematic Video Editor who is deeply embedded in generative video workflows and can independently craft high-quality, narrative-driven content from concept to final output.</strong></p> <p>You are a sharp-eyed video editor comfortable operating at the intersection of creativity and emerging technology, building visually compelling longform videos using AI-first pipelines. You take ownership of the entire production stack — from prompting and generation to editing, compositing, graphic design work and final delivery. You thrive in a high-performance environment where your quick wits and passion for story-telling shine.</p> <p>Reporting to your Content Lead, this is what you'll be doing:</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <h2>Key Responsibilities</h2> <ul> <li> <p>Conceptualise scripts based on current production needs and centred around existing AI characters (our own IPs)</p> </li> <li> <p>Create&nbsp;<strong>narrative-driven, longform video content</strong>, including stylized and explicit NSFW visuals, with a strong focus on storytelling, atmosphere, and visual coherence throughout</p> </li> <li> <p>Own and manage&nbsp;<strong>end-to-end AI video production workflows</strong>, from ideation and prompting to generation, editing, and post-production</p> </li> <li> <p>Work extensively with&nbsp;<strong>ComfyUI pipelines</strong>, building, customizing, and optimizing node-based workflows for image and video generation</p> </li&
